meta.title: Alejandro Moreno Martín — Product Designer
meta.description: Product Designer specialising in digital interfaces, design systems, and user experience. Open to new opportunities.

hero.name: Alejandro Moreno
hero.tagline: I design digital products that balance business, technology, and people.

about.label: About
about.heading: Design with intention
about.p1: I'm a Product Designer with a background in UX/UI design and business thinking. I navigate the space between what users need, what teams can build, and what companies want to achieve.
about.p2: I care about making products that make sense: clear interfaces, well-thought-out flows, and design systems that scale. I work collaboratively and can communicate design decisions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
about.p3: I'm looking to join a team where design is part of the product process from the start, not just a final layer.

skills.title: UX Design
skills.description: User research, information architecture, wireframing, and hypothesis validation. Human-centred design with business acumen.

skills.title: UI Design
skills.description: High-quality visual interfaces with robust design systems. Detail-obsessed: typography, spacing, motion.

skills.title: Product Thinking
skills.description: Ability to prioritise, define success metrics, and make design decisions aligned with product goals.

skills.title: Prototyping
skills.description: Interactive prototypes in Figma to validate flows before development. From rapid exploration to engineering handoff.

skills.title: Design Systems
skills.description: Building and maintaining scalable design systems with tokens, components, and documentation for cross-functional teams.

skills.title: Collaboration
skills.description: Experience working with developers, PMs, and stakeholders. I facilitate discovery sessions and translate business goals into design.

projects.title: kako-ai design system
projects.description: A complete design system for an AI projects workspace. Color tokens, typography, spacing, shadows, and light/dark themes. Built on Tailwind CSS and consumed by multiple apps.

projects.title: Personal portfolio
projects.description: Design and development of the portfolio you're reading now. Modern stack with Astro, bilingual (ES/EN), full SEO, and visit analytics.

projects.title: CV Tracker
projects.description: A tool to manage the job search process: tracking applications, statuses, companies, and notes. Designed for personal use during my active job search.

projects.title: Next project
projects.description: Currently working on a new project. More soon.

items.description: Exploring opportunities in digital product design. In the meantime, building my own projects to apply and demonstrate my skills.
Intensive training in product design, tools (Figma, Prototyping), design systems, and front-end fundamentals (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript).

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.description: I'm looking to join a team where design has real impact. If you have an interesting project or an opportunity that fits, reach out.
contact.availableFor: Available for: full-time role · freelance · collaborations
